# fleetdm_configuration (Data Source)

Fetches the Fleet application configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get Fleet server configuration
data "fleetdm_configuration" "current" {}

output "org_name" {
  value = data.fleetdm_configuration.current.org_name
}

output "server_url" {
  value = data.fleetdm_configuration.current.server_url
}

output "license_tier" {
  value = data.fleetdm_configuration.current.license_tier
}

output "license_expiration" {
  value = data.fleetdm_configuration.current.license_expiration
}

# Example: Conditional resources based on license
locals {
  is_premium = data.fleetdm_configuration.current.license_tier == "premium"
}

# Only create team resources if premium license
resource "fleetdm_team" "example" {
  count       = local.is_premium ? 1 : 0
  name        = "Premium Team"
  description = "This team requires Fleet Premium"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `activity_expiry_enabled` (Boolean) Whether automatic activity cleanup is enabled.
- `activity_expiry_window` (Number) The number of days after which activities are cleaned up.
- `ai_features_disabled` (Boolean) Whether AI features are disabled.
- `contact_url` (String) The URL for contacting support.
- `enable_analytics` (Boolean) Whether analytics are enabled.
- `enable_host_users` (Boolean) Whether host user collection is enabled.
- `enable_software_inventory` (Boolean) Whether software inventory collection is enabled.
- `host_expiry_enabled` (Boolean) Whether automatic host expiry is enabled.
- `host_expiry_window` (Number) The number of days after which hosts are expired.
- `license_device_count` (Number) The maximum number of devices allowed by the license.
- `license_expiration` (String) The expiration date of the license.
- `license_organization` (String) The organization name in the license.
- `license_tier` (String) The Fleet license tier (e.g., 'free', 'premium').
- `live_query_disabled` (Boolean) Whether live queries are disabled.
- `mdm_apple_bm_enabled_and_configured` (Boolean) Whether Apple Business Manager is enabled and configured.
- `mdm_apple_bm_terms_expired` (Boolean) Whether Apple Business Manager terms have expired.
- `mdm_enabled_and_configured` (Boolean) Whether MDM is enabled and configured.
- `org_logo_url` (String) The URL of the organization logo.
- `org_logo_url_light_background` (String) The URL of the organization logo for light backgrounds.
- `org_name` (String) The name of the organization using Fleet.
- `query_reports_disabled` (Boolean) Whether query reports are disabled.
- `sandbox_enabled` (Boolean) Whether this is a sandbox instance.
- `scripts_disabled` (Boolean) Whether scripts are disabled.
- `server_url` (String) The Fleet server URL.
- `transparency_url` (String) The transparency URL shown in Fleet Desktop.
